stemHtml: A possible threat associated with the use of airborne weather radar to detect potentially hazardous conditions is..

options.a: the omission of and /or difficulties in detecting moderate rain.
options.b: that heavy precipitation forms a shield for the area beyond where severe weather may exist.
options.c: that there is always an error in the determination of wind speed.
options.d: the impossibility to identify the differences between obscuration and precipitation.
